name: Spirit Breaker
description: I'm the beast of many parts; I part enemies from their lives.

abilities.name: Bulldoze
abilities.description: Grants Barathrum bonus movement speed and status resistance to ram through enemy units.

abilities.name: Greater Bash
abilities.description: Has a chance to stun and knockback an enemy unit on an attack that deals a portion of Barathrum's current movement speed as damage. Roshan is innately immune to all forced movement sources. However, the damage component still applies.

abilities.name: Planar Pocket
abilities.description: Increases self magic resistance and redirects spells cast by enemy heroes at the target towards him.

abilities.name: Nether Strike
abilities.description: Barathrum temporarily returns to the realm from where he came, bringing with him the retribution of both worlds.
